text.title: Error Budget Policy and Freeze Rules Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: draft-doctrine
step.action: Draft policy text covering declarers, allow/deny, revert, comms, review cadence.

step.name: signoff-cycle
step.action: Engineering leader + product VP sign. Capture date + signatures.
step.note: Gate: If product or eng won't sign, escalate — unsigned policy is dead letter.

step.name: wire-machine-readable-freeze-rules
step.action: Author freeze-rules.yaml. Reference from alertmanager + check-revert-criteria.py.

step.name: configure-comms-pipeline
step.action: Configure alertmanager / paging tool to post to declared channels. Test with a simulated burn.

step.name: annual-review-schedule
step.action: Schedule annual review. Calendar invite to engineering leader + product VP.
